---
title: "Instruction Sets and Control Unit"
subtitle: "Module 3 — BCSE205L"
author: "Justus Raju"
date: last-modified
---

## Outline

::: {.incremental}
- Instruction sets and Instruction Set Architecture
- Instruction formats and categories
- Addressing modes
- Phases of instruction cycle
- ALU design
- Data path and control unit
- Hardwired vs. Microprogrammed control unit
- Performance metrics: Execution time, MIPS, MFLOPS
:::

::: {.notes}
This module covers the instruction set architecture, addressing modes, the phases of instruction execution, and the design of the control unit — both hardwired and microprogrammed approaches. Performance metrics for evaluating machine capabilities are also introduced.
:::
